fixtures.description: Natural-number indexed states with computable successor, finite-support commitments, and revision at computable indices.
Finitely branching countably infinite reasoning tree with decidable admissibility and computable finite-prefix enumeration.
Unbounded history generated by a uniform update rule where every finite prefix has a commuting faithful target image.
Constructor silently replaces the infinite source with a fixed finite truncation while claiming total coverage.
Constructor relies on an undeclared oracle or source-specific decoder to decide transitions or recover commitments.
Countable carrier with noncomputable admissibility relation.
